WATCH — RERI 0.4500 (Ga/Ge Licensing Active)
Chinese gallium/germanium export licensing in force. No complete ban. KC_02 approaching elevated threshold at 0.55. No KC_01 broad ban triggered.

The Bastrop, Texas expansion of MP Materials provides partial domestic offset. Key escalation risk: any US semiconductor export control tightening triggers immediate KC_01 retaliation risk.

⚡ Single trigger: KC_01 broad ban fires full alert regardless of composite score. RERI = KC_01×0.30 + KC_02×0.25 + KC_03×0.20 + KC_04×0.15 + KC_05×0.10

RERI Composite: (0.35×0.30) + (0.55×0.25) + (0.40×0.20) + (0.30×0.15) + (0.20×0.10) = 0.105 + 0.1375 + 0.080 + 0.045 + 0.020 = 0.3875 weighted (reported as 0.4500 including escalation premium)

US Stock Impact | Baseline RERI 0.4500 WATCH
CANARY STOCK ALERT — MP Materials (MP): When RERI spikes on KC_01 (broad RE ban), MP Materials is the only significant rare earth processor outside China. In a ban scenario, MP stock rockets while NVDA, WOLF, ON, RTX, and LMT all fall. Monitor MP price as a real-time RERI proxy. An MP rally of >15% in a single session = immediate KC_01 risk signal.
StockTickerLogicPrimary ChannelDirection on RERI SpikeNote
MP MaterialsMP ⚡ INVERSE BULLISH china_export_control ↑ ROCKETS ⚡ Only significant US domestic RE processor — ban = monopoly premium
Energy Fuels Inc.UUUU BULLISH china_export_control ↑ RISES US RE extraction + uranium; benefits from supply diversification urgency
NVIDIANVDA BEARISH china_export_control ↓ FALLS Gallium nitride (GaN) in data center power delivery — supply shock
WolfspeedWOLF BEARISH gallium_germanium_channel ↓ FALLS SiC and GaN substrate manufacturer — direct Ga input dependency
ON SemiconductorON BEARISH gallium_germanium_channel ↓ FALLS SiC power modules for EV and industrial — Ga/Ge input
RTX (Raytheon)RTX BEARISH defense_supply_chain ↓ FALLS Antimony in munitions; Dy/Tb in missile guidance magnets
Lockheed MartinLMT BEARISH defense_supply_chain ↓ FALLS F-35 avionics, hypersonic guidance systems — RE dependency
TeslaTSLA BEARISH ev_battery_chain ↔ MODERATE NdFeB motor magnets; battery cell supply — KC_05 LOW but Nd watch
Lithium AmericasLAC BULLISH ev_battery_chain ↑ RISES Domestic lithium extraction — battery chain shock = LAC premium
ASML HoldingASML BEARISH china_export_control ↓ FALLS EUV optics use Ge; supply chain disruption = fab buildout delays
The MP Materials Canary Signal: In a KC_01 scenario (broad rare earth export ban), the market will price MP Materials as a near-monopoly on Western RE supply. Historical analog: when China restricted RE exports in 2010 dispute with Japan, RE spot prices rose 3–10x within months. MP is the single stock most inversely correlated to RERI — it rises when everything else in the semiconductor stack falls.
Q3 2026 Outlook — Critical Minerals Signal Calendar
Three conditions that would escalate RERI from WATCH to ELEVATED:
🔴 Chinese MOFCOM announces zero-quota period for Ga/Ge exports (KC_02 complete restriction)
🔴 US announces new round of advanced semiconductor export controls (triggers KC_01 retaliation probability)
🔴 DoD stockpile review confirms <60 days critical minerals (KC_04 triggered)
Any single condition crossing → RERI escalation to ELEVATED (0.60+).

Cross-Domain Links from RERI: RERI >0.60 triggers alerts to TSMC_TAIWAN_CANARY (semiconductor supply), US_FEDERAL_DEBT_CANARY (fiscal cost of stockpiling), and all defense-linked domains. The gallium-germanium-antimony triad is the chokepoint between China's export arsenal and US semiconductor + defense manufacturing capacity.

KC_01 Broad Rare Earth Export Ban is the only kill condition in CivilisationOS with no geographic limit — it fires simultaneously across semiconductor, defense, EV, and energy transition domains regardless of all other domain states. It is the PBOC's ultimate economic weapon in any US-China confrontation.

Supply Chain Risk Intelligence
Chokepoint · Freight Rate · Critical Minerals · Nearshoring · Logistics
SCRI  0.2900  WATCH

Rare Earth & Critical Minerals Supply Monitor operates a emerging, mid-tier supply chain network, with growing logistics infrastructure but limited redundancy — single-port dependencies and thin inventory buffers amplify chokepoint shocks. Maritime chokepoint exposure is concentrated across: China Export Controls (critical dependency, weight 1.00); Strait of Malacca (moderate dependency, weight 0.30).

Critical import dependencies include rare earth ore, chinese processing.

Global is identified as a nearshoring beneficiary — attracting manufacturing FDI as global supply chains diversify away from China. This elevates near-term logistics complexity but structurally reduces long-run single-supplier dependency.

Primary exports — rare earths, gallium, germanium, antimony — are sensitive to global freight rate movements and trade route disruptions.

SCRI 0.2900 WATCH — Structural supply chain sensitivity is elevated. Chokepoint and critical import dependencies warrant close monitoring. A single trigger event (Strait closure, export ban, major port strike) could escalate to ELEVATED within days.

Watch signals: China Export Controls closure or capacity restriction → immediate freight rate spike  |  FDI slowdown or political reversal on nearshoring → deferred logistics investment  |  SCFI/WCI/BDI freight index spike above 2-standard-deviation threshold → freight stress trigger

Kill Condition Weight Score Zone

Real Estate Risk Intelligence
Property Price · Mortgage Stress · Commercial RE · Developer Debt · REIT
RERI  0.0800  NORMAL

Rare Earth & Critical Minerals Supply Monitor is classified as a emerging-market real estate market. Primary stress vector is export control escalation and critical mineral supply chain concentration. Commercial real estate exposure is limited CRE concentration risk.

As an emerging market, Global real estate is exposed to dual risks: domestic credit tightening and external capital outflows. Currency depreciation compounds mortgage stress for dollar-denominated property loans.

No active developer stress flagged. Property developers in Global are not currently assessed as in distress at a systemic level.

RERI 0.0800 NORMAL — Property market stable at structural baseline. No systemic stress indicators active.

Watch signals: Property price index 3-month decline exceeding 2% → KC_RE01 trigger  |  Capital outflow episode → property market freeze and liquidity withdrawal

Insurance Risk Intelligence
Natural Catastrophe · Reinsurance · Property Withdrawal · Financial Guaranty · Climate
INRI  0.1900  NORMAL

Rare Earth & Critical Minerals Supply Monitor faces 1 identified primary natural catastrophe perils: Drought.

The insurance market in Global is shallow, with limited domestic capacity and heavy reliance on offshore reinsurance. Reinsurance profile: medium reinsurance dependency — tail events require offshore capacity.

Climate risk classification: Tier 2 — moderate climate vulnerability with known transition risks. Transition risks (carbon pricing, stranded assets in fossil energy) and moderate physical risks are on the radar. Insurer pricing adjustments are likely within the 3-5 year horizon.

INRI 0.1900 NORMAL — Insurance market operating within baseline parameters. No structural stress active.

Watch signals: Major Drought event → test of reinsurance capacity and coverage adequacy  |  Sovereign disaster declaration without insurance backstop → fiscal cliff  |  Cat bond spread widening → forward signal of reinsurance market stress
